hero.title: Serious software for companies
hero.description: Development, platforms, and consulting with real engineering discipline: maintainable code, honest scope, and solutions meant to run for years — not demos that shine and nobody maintains.

story.title: We got tired of the same script: big promises, fragile deliveries.
story.lead: BITFLOW exists for teams that need a digital partner who signs with the same standards they sleep on: original, explainable, useful work. If your business depends on software, you deserve better than disguised templates and endless patches.

chapters.title: Your operation isn't a playground for cheap experiments
chapters.body: Every technical choice should hold up in front of your CFO, your auditor, or your end customer. That's why we bias toward clarity: readable architecture, visible risks, and releases your team can run the Monday after — not only in a Friday demo.

chapters.title: No bullshit software
chapters.body: We don't sell empty magic; we don't ship plagiarism or repackage someone else's work as ours; we don't sneak in billable features you won't use. We build real software: tested where it counts, documented when it helps, and honest about its limits.

chapters.title: Built to evolve, not to rip out next year
chapters.body: We'd rather say "no" to a requirement we know will break your system than say "yes" just to close the sale. We think about whoever maintains the code two years out — sometimes you, sometimes us, and sometimes someone new who deserves context, not a graveyard of hacks.

chapters.title: From idea to long term, in the same language
chapters.body: We thread APIs, cloud, data, and product into one narrative: fewer "business vs IT" translation meetings, more shared decisions and traceability for why each choice was made.

story.manifestoTitle: Useful, maintainable software — without moral fine print.
story.manifestoBody: At BITFLOW we build digital solutions for any company that values time, money, and reputation: engineering that respects your users, your teams, and the future of the product. That's what sets us apart from market noise.
story.closing: If you want a team that tells you the technical truth and helps you build something that lasts, you're already in the right place.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: One focus: high-quality digital product — from first conversation to evolutionary support.

engineering.title: Serious software engineering — no fluff, no throwaway code
engineering.intro: We don't ship fragile throwaways or promise what we can't sustain. Clear standards: understandable design, testing where it matters, controlled technical debt, and clean IP — what we build is yours, not disguised copy-paste.
points: We solve real needs: less operational friction, faster processes, and more predictable delivery or service.
Maintainable, documented code so your team or ours can evolve the product with confidence.
Transparency on scope, risk, and cost — we won't sell you features you won't use just to inflate the invoice.

software.title: Software development
software.description: Tailored web apps and backends, integrations, and continuous delivery — built to last, not to become obsolete in a few months.

consulting.title: Solution consulting
consulting.description: Straight talk on tech and business: architecture, priorities, and a roadmap you can actually ship and maintain.

platforms.title: Management platforms
platforms.description: Automation and dashboards that structure your ops: less manual work, better traceability, and sharper decisions with the same headcount.

partners.title: Technology brands and alliances
partners.lead: We are AWS and Google Cloud partners: we design, deploy, and operate cloud workloads with solid cybersecurity practices and cost discipline. We also build with blockchain and Web3 — from enterprise traceability to wallet integrations and smart contracts.

showcase.title: How a BITFLOW engagement flows
showcase.subtitle: Two complementary fronts — build well and sustain over time — with the same cadence: understand, propose, and deliver with clarity.
showcase.diagramAria: Diagram: product build and sustainability merge into a three-stage process
showcase.laneSoftwareHint: Digital products, APIs, cloud, integrations, and releases your team can operate.
showcase.laneSustainHint: Quality, tests, documentation, and evolutionary support — without toxic debt hidden under the rug.
showcase.footnote: Timelines depend on scope and integrations; specifics land in the proposal — without sneaky fine print.

successStories.title: Success stories
successStories.subtitle: Recent deliveries across education, retail, agro, health, and logistics — built for Latin American teams and users.

platforms.title: End-to-end academic digital ecosystem
platforms.solution: Multi-program college: mobile app for students and web portal for faculty and admin. Live grades, QR attendance, elective enrollment, push notices, and tuition module linked to a regional payment gateway.
platforms.tech: React Native · Next.js · NestJS · PostgreSQL · Redis · FCM · payments REST API
platforms.result: Less operational load on enrollment and comms; faster student inquiries and a single channel for official notices.

platforms.title: Centralized inventory and sales
platforms.solution: Chain across several cities: live stock per branch, inter-store transfers, e-invoicing integration, and regional management reporting.
platforms.tech: Next.js · Node.js · TypeScript · PostgreSQL · BullMQ · e-invoicing API
platforms.result: Unified inventory visibility; fewer count discrepancies and quicker month-end closes across stores.

platforms.title: Lot traceability on blockchain
platforms.solution: Exporter: custody chain from field and packing plant to container. QR labels and NFC reads, events on a permissioned ledger, and auditor/buyer portal.
platforms.tech: Hyperledger Fabric · Node.js · Express · React · IPFS (documents) · PostgreSQL off-chain
platforms.result: Origin and movements verified in minutes; smoother audits and clearer answers to buyer questions.

platforms.title: Scheduling, reminders, and telehealth
platforms.solution: Clinic network: online booking, WhatsApp reminders, concise patient record, and gated video rooms per clinician.
platforms.tech: Vue 3 · Laravel · MySQL · Redis · WhatsApp Business API · WebRTC
platforms.result: Fewer no-shows and a calmer waiting room; better room utilization without double-booking.

platforms.title: Same-day routing and proof of delivery
platforms.solution: Last-mile operator: zone-based courier assignment, map tracking, delivery proof with photo and e-signature, polygon-based pricing.
platforms.tech: React · FastAPI · Python · PostGIS · Mapbox · Celery
platforms.result: More on-time deliveries in the promised window and fewer status disputes.

testimonials.title: Client voices
testimonials.subtitle: What clients highlight about working with us.

items.quote: We needed to get out of spreadsheet chaos. The team shipped a usable first version in weeks and stayed through rollout.
items.name: Mariana Ortega

items.quote: Consulting helped us prioritize without blowing the budget. Clear documentation and short, focused meetings.
items.name: Andrés Morales

items.quote: They helped us integrate a difficult legacy without stopping operations. Clear documentation and milestone deliveries we could actually review.
items.name: Roberto Silva

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A clear process so you know what to expect at each stage.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.description: We listen to goals, context, and constraints. We define initial scope and risks.

step2.title: Proposal
step2.description: We share options, timelines, and a transparent estimate before moving forward.

step3.title: Delivery
step3.description: Incremental delivery, frequent communication, and evolutionary support after go-live.

about.title: About BITFLOW
about.description: A team focused on serious digital product: code you can read, run, and evolve.
about.paragraph1: BITFLOW supports companies and teams that need an engineering partner aligned with the business — from architecture and cloud to the front-line details your users touch every day.
about.paragraph2: We work with SMBs, scale-ups, and IT groups modernizing without betting on fragile solutions or opaque vendor dependency.
about.imageAlt: Team collaborating on a technology project

cta.title: Have a technical challenge or a project in mind?
cta.description: Tell us where you are and we will reply with concrete next steps.

q1.question: Do you only work with large enterprises?
q1.answer: Not necessarily. We fit SMBs and mid-sized teams — what matters is real impact and a quality bar we can commit to.

q2.question: How is a software project quoted?
q2.answer: After an initial conversation we define scope, deliverables, and engagement model (project-based or phased). There is no charge for that first assessment.

q3.question: Do you offer maintenance or support afterward?
q3.answer: Yes. We agree evolutionary support, continuous improvement, or monitoring depending on the product and how critical it is to your business.

q4.question: Is the code and IP ours?
q4.answer: Yes, unless we explicitly agree otherwise: what we build for your project is yours — we don't resell it to competitors or pass third-party work as our own.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Leave your details and a short summary. We will reply by email or, if you prefer, coordinate via WhatsApp.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your need, timeline, and context (current stack, user volume, integrations).
contact.success: Thank you. We received your message and will get back to you soon.

projects.title: Projects built with BITFLOW
projects.subtitle: Products and platforms we have taken from requirements to production: context, stack, client need, and outcome.
projects.pipeline: More projects in the pipeline — if your challenge looks like this, let’s talk.

items.title: Shrimp harvest management & traceability platform
items.summary: System to record batches, process stages, and movements from harvest through dispatch, with auditable traceability for export and compliance.
items.need: Replace spreadsheets and scattered files with one digital flow; demonstrate origin and chain of custody for buyers and audits.
items.tech: Web app and API on Node.js/NestJS, PostgreSQL, document storage, reports and dashboards; cloud deployment with backups and roles per plant or site.
items.outcome: Near–real-time visibility of inventory by batch, fewer traceability errors, and faster answers to customer and certification questions.

items.title: Educational management platform for in-person and online classes
items.summary: Unified academic environment: materials, attendance, grades, and communication across faculty, students, and administration.
items.need: Run in-person and remote without duplicating tools; cut admin load and give families and students clarity.
items.tech: React/Next.js frontend, modular backend, relational database, notifications (email/push as designed), integrated or linked video, roles and permissions by campus.
items.outcome: A single channel for official notices, cleaner performance tracking, and less friction in enrollment and day-to-day communication.

items.title: Sports event timing platform
items.summary: Application to capture times per participant or team, live rankings, and publishing results during competitions.
items.need: Move off paper or shared sheets; reduce disputes and delays when posting official results.
items.tech: Responsive web app and high-throughput API, duplicate protection, panel for judges or officials, optional integration with readers or manual entry.
items.outcome: More reliable, faster results, less repetitive work for staff, and a better experience for athletes and spectators.

items.title: Patient & medical appointment management platform
items.summary: Medical scheduling, concise history, reminders, and front-desk flow for clinics or outpatient networks.
items.need: Cut no-shows, prevent double-booking, and organize patient information beyond paper alone.
items.tech: Vue or React depending on project, backend with appointment rules, WhatsApp or other reminder channels, access patterns aligned with sensitive data.
items.outcome: A fuller schedule without clashes, fewer absences, and reception with context before the visit.

items.title: Events platform
items.summary: Registration, payment or confirmation, badges, and communications for conferences, fairs, or corporate programs.
items.need: Centralize attendees, capacity, and comms; avoid email threads and spreadsheets that go stale within hours.
items.tech: Public portal + admin console, payment gateway when needed, lists and exports, automated notifications.
items.outcome: More predictable event operations, fewer rework cycles, and a smoother experience for attendees and organizers.

items.title: AI-powered app — Manabí gastronomy recommendations
items.summary: Mobile or web experience suggesting dishes, routes, or venues by preference, context, and regional culinary heritage.
items.need: Deliver personalized discovery without hand-curating everything; connect tourism and culture with structured data and an authentic local voice.
items.tech: React Native or PWA client, recommendation services and business rules, AI models or APIs as designed, curated content in a database.
items.outcome: Users find options that fit their profile faster; the client differentiates with a modern, local-first experience.

items.title: Professional landing page for a language school
items.summary: High-conversion site with clear value, levels, modalities, and calls to action toward contact or enrollment.
items.need: A credible web presence that reflects teaching quality; fast mobile loads and consistent messaging, optionally multilingual.
items.tech: Next.js, SEO- and performance-oriented content, forms wired to CRM or email, responsive accessible layout.
items.outcome: More qualified inquiries, low load times, and a first impression aligned with the school’s brand.

items.title: Enrollment & portfolio management platform for an educational institution
items.summary: Control of enrollments, agreements, account status, and academic-financial tracking in one institutional environment.
items.need: Unify student linkage and billing/plans without relying on endless Excels and email chains.
items.tech: Web app with roles (finance, registrar, leadership), reporting and export, change audit trails, backups, and granular permissions.
items.outcome: Clearer portfolio visibility by program and cohort, fewer disputes from misaligned data, and faster month-end closes.

items.title: Bulk WhatsApp messaging platform
items.summary: Tool for campaigns and notifications to authorized lists, with templates, queues, and delivery traceability.
items.need: Scale communication without breaking platform policies; track what was sent and avoid mass manual copy-paste errors.
items.tech: Backend with queues (e.g. BullMQ), WhatsApp Business API integration, campaign console, logs and retries, infra ready for traffic spikes.
items.outcome: Governed bulk sends, better visibility of message status, and operations less dependent on spreadsheets.

chatbot.title: Online advisor
chatbot.subtitle: BITFLOW
chatbot.contactHint: Fill in the form and choose WhatsApp or email — we open a ready-to-send message.
chatbot.requiredHint: Name and at least one channel (email or phone) help us reply properly.
chatbot.greeting: Hi — I'm BITFLOW's virtual assistant. I can guide you on custom software, platforms, consulting, how we work (**No bullshit software**), brands we use, and next steps. What do you need?

answers.philosophy: BITFLOW stands for **No bullshit software**: honest delivery, maintainable code, no plagiarism or repackaged third-party work, and full transparency on scope and risk. Read the **Why BITFLOW** section on the page for our story and promise.
answers.services: We focus on **software & digital platforms**: custom development, consulting, integrations, cloud, and operations automation. See **What we do** for detail.
answers.software: We build custom web apps and backends, integrations, and ongoing evolution. We focus on maintainable code and clear scope — see the **Serious software engineering** block under Services.
answers.consulting: Consulting covers architecture, priorities, and a roadmap you can actually ship and maintain — without inflated promises.
answers.platforms: We design management and automation platforms to streamline operations: inventory, workflows, reporting, and less repetitive manual work.
answers.integrations: We connect existing systems (ERP, gateways, legacy) with modern APIs, queues, and clear contracts — without breaking what already pays the bills.
answers.cloud: We're **AWS and Google Cloud partners**: we design and run cloud workloads with solid security and cost practices. More under **Technology partners**.
answers.blockchain: We build with **blockchain & Web3**: Hyperledger Fabric, Ethereum/L2, IPFS, smart contracts, and wallet integration when the use case fits (e.g. traceability).
answers.partners: **Technology partners** lists cloud, blockchain, software stacks, and quality/ops practices we use on real projects.
answers.successStories: **Success stories** highlights real work in education, retail, agri with ledger traceability, health, and logistics — each in a Latin American context. If you were looking for “case studies,” this is the same kind of detail: scope, tech, and outcomes.
answers.projects: The **Projects built with BITFLOW** section describes real products: overview, client need, technology, and outcome — including shrimp traceability, education, sports timing, health, events, AI gastronomy, language-school landing, institutional portfolio, and bulk WhatsApp.
answers.pricing: Every quote depends on scope and integrations. The first scoping conversation has no cost. Use the contact form or the button below for concrete options.
answers.location: We work **remotely** with online meetings, aligned to your time zone. If you need occasional onsite work, we discuss it in the proposal.
answers.timing: Timelines depend on deliverable size and integrations. **How we work** explains diagnosis, proposal, and phased delivery.
answers.process: Typical flow: **diagnosis** (goals and risks), **proposal** (clear scope and estimate), and **implementation** in milestones with handover support.
answers.about: BITFLOW is led by Eng. Darío Vélez Román, Ms. We bring product judgment, architecture, and execution for teams that can't afford fragile delivery.
answers.audience: We serve **companies and product/IT teams** — from growing SMBs to initiatives inside larger orgs that want a serious technical partner.
answers.contactPrompt: To reach the team, use the **contact form** on the page or tap **I want to be contacted** below — I'll prepare WhatsApp or email with your details.
answers.fallback: I don't have an exact auto-reply for that. Try a keyword (software, integrations, quote, AWS, blockchain, quality…) or use the assistant contact form and a human will reply.

footer.tagline: Digital software and platforms with engineering judgment — no fluff.
